title: Deavy's Simple Soulslike Status Effects
description: A collection of status effects with display bars inspired by Soulsborne games
body:
### **WIP**

Currently adds: **2 Status Effects, 4 Items , 2 Enchantments, 1 Potion Effect, 1 Biome**

This mod was made with ample inspiration from the soulsborne franchise and will include dozens of uniqe status effects and enchantments.

##  **Toxic**
**When toxic reaches 100 points it deals 10 damage that passes through armor and resets the toxic level. Toxic degenerates by 2 every second.**

**Biome - Contaminated Forest** - This biome is not yet complete. When the player is in this biome, if they are not wearing a helmet with the tag ***simple_soulslike_status_effects:eye_protection***, the biome will be filled with thick fog. **In this biome Toxic is passively generated at 4 per second.**

**Toxic Meter** - Displays current toxic level in 10 bars. Each bar represents 10 toxic points starting from 1.

**Toxic Coating** - Enchantment that adds 5 points of toxic to the target per level of enchantment. Max level is 2.

**Item - Apply Toxic** - When rightclicked it adds 5 points of toxic to self, when striking an enemy it applies 5 points of toxic to target.

**Item - Gas Mask** - Tagged as eye protection, when this helmet is worn, you can see clearly in the Contaminated Forest and an overlay covers the screen.

##  **Frostbite**
**When frostbite reaches 100 points it kills the target. Frostbite degenerates by 1 every second. Passively generated in biomes with a biome temperature of 0 and below at 2 points/s**

**Frostbite Effect** - Every 10 point of frostbite, the frostbite effect is increased. The frostbite effect reduces target attack speed, movement speed and increases entity gravity.

**Frostbite Meter** - Displays current frostbite level in 10 bars. Each bar represents 10 frostbite points starting from 1.

**Frost Runes** - Enchantment that adds 5 points of frostbite to the target per level of enchantment. Max level is 2.

**Item - Apply Frostbite** - When rightclicked it adds 5 points of frostbite to self, when striking an enemy it applies 5 points of frostbite to target.

**Item - Knitted Hat** - Currently does not do anything.
